title: DfE Application Submission Process
description: The submission of teachers training applications in UK under UK Government Department, DfE (Department for Education).

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

dfeApplicationId.title: DfE Application ID
dfeApplicationId.description: The unique DfE ID of this application.

attribute.title: Attribute
attribute.description: The attributes of the application and applicant.

phase.title: Phase
phase.description: The phase of this application. In the first phase, 'Apply 1', the candidate can choose up to 3 courses. If all of those choices are rejected, declined, or withdrawn, the user can go into 'Apply 2'. This means they can choose 1 course at a time.

rejectByDefaultOn.title: Reject By Default Date
rejectByDefaultOn.description: Time when the application is due to be rejected by default.

recruitedOn.title: Recruited On
recruitedOn.description: Indicates when the candidate met their conditions, receiving a firm place on the course.

statusBeforeDeferral.title: Status Before Deferral
statusBeforeDeferral.description: The status of the application before deferral.

deferredToRecruitmentCycleYear.title: Deferred To Recruitment Cycle Year
deferredToRecruitmentCycleYear.description: The recruitment cycle year a deferred application can be confirmed.

personalStatement.title: Personal Statement
personalStatement.description: The candidate’s personal statement, combined from the 'Becoming a Teacher' and 'Subject Knowledge' fields in the application form.

furtherInformation.title: Further Information
furtherInformation.description: Other personal or professional issues relevant to the application which are not covered in the form.

id.title: ID
id.description: The candidate’s ID in the Apply system.

nationality.title: Nationality
nationality.description: One or more ISO 3166 country codes.

domicile.title: Domicile
domicile.description: The candidate’s domicile, extracted from their address.

ukResidencyStatus.title: UK Residency Status
ukResidencyStatus.description: The candidate’s UK residency status, e.g. Citizen.

ukResidencyStatusCode.title: UK Residency Status Code
ukResidencyStatusCode.description: The candidate’s UK residency status code.

feePayer.title: Fee Payer
feePayer.description: Provisional fee payer status based on a candidate's nationality, residency status and domicile.

englishMainLanguage.title: English Main Language
englishMainLanguage.description: Does this candidate have English as a main language?

englishLanguageQualification.title: English Language Qualification
englishLanguageQualification.description: About this candidate's English language qualifications, if English is not their main language.

otherLanguage.title: Other Language
otherLanguage.description: Details of the candidate's fluency in other languages.

disabilityDisclosure.title: Disability Disclosure
disabilityDisclosure.description: Voluntary disclosure of disabliity or SEN so providers can provide appropriate support.

contactDetails.title: Contact Details
contactDetails.description: Phone, email and physical addresses where an applicant may be contacted.

country.title: Country
country.description: The candidate’s country - ISO 3166 country code.

course.title: Course
course.description: Identifies the subject requested by an applicant and all related information.

gcses.title: GCSES
gcses.description: Information related to General Certificate of Secondary Education (GCSE) exams.

id.title: ID
id.description: The qualification ID in the Apply system.

nonUkQualificationType.title: Non UK Qualification Type
nonUkQualificationType.description: For a qualification of type non_uk, this field will contain a free-text description of the qualification type.

subjectCode.title: Subject Code
subjectCode.description: The HECoS code for the subject studied, if available.

awardYear.title: Award Year
awardYear.description: The year the award was made.

institutionDetails.title: Institution Details
institutionDetails.description: Details about the institution and awarding body.

equivalencyDetails.title: Equivalency Details
equivalencyDetails.description: Details of equivalency, if this qualification was awarded overseas.

awardingBody.title: Awarding Body
awardingBody.description: Details about the qualification awarding body.

startYear.title: Start Year
startYear.description: The year the candidate started qualification.

id.title: ID
id.description: The qualification ID in the Apply system.

nonUkQualificationType.title: Non UK Qualification Type
nonUkQualificationType.description: For a qualification of type non_uk, this field will contain a free-text description of the qualification type.

subjectCode.title: Subject Code
subjectCode.description: The HECoS code for the subject studied, if available.

awardYear.title: Award Year
awardYear.description: The year the award was made.

institutionDetails.title: Institution Details
institutionDetails.description: Details about the institution and awarding body.

equivalencyDetails.title: Equivalency Details
equivalencyDetails.description: Details of equivalency, if this qualification was awarded overseas.

awardingBody.title: Awarding Body
awardingBody.description: Details about the qualification awarding body.

startYear.title: Start Year
startYear.description: The year the candidate started qualification.

otherQualifications.title: Other Qualifications
otherQualifications.description: Additional qualification details of an applicant.

id.title: ID
id.description: The qualification ID in the Apply system.

nonUkQualificationType.title: Non UK Qualification Type
nonUkQualificationType.description: For a qualification of type non_uk, this field will contain a free-text description of the qualification type.

subjectCode.title: Subject Code
subjectCode.description: The HECoS code for the subject studied, if available.

awardYear.title: Award Year
awardYear.description: The year the award was made.

institutionDetails.title: Institution Details
institutionDetails.description: Details about the institution and awarding body.

equivalencyDetails.title: Equivalency Details
equivalencyDetails.description: Details of equivalency, if this qualification was awarded overseas.

awardingBody.title: Awarding Body
awardingBody.description: Details about the qualification awarding body.

startYear.title: Start Year
startYear.description: The year the candidate started qualification.

missingGcsesExplanation.title: Missing gcses Explanation
missingGcsesExplanation.description: If the candidate lacks any required GCSEs, this field will contain their free-text explanation of why this is the case.

workExperience.title: Work Experience
workExperience.description: Information about an applicant’s current and previous employments.

id.title: ID
id.description: The work experience ID in the Apply system.

endDate.title: End Date
endDate.description: The date the position finished, if applicable.

role.title: Role
role.description: The position held by the candidate.

description.title: Description
description.description: A written description of the work involved.

workingWithChildren.title: Working With Children
workingWithChildren.description: Did this position involve working in a school or with children?

commitment.title: Commitment
commitment.description: Whether the work was full time or part time.

volunteering.title: Volunteering
volunteering.description: Information about an applicant’s volunteering experience.

id.title: ID
id.description: The work experience ID in the Apply system.

endDate.title: End Date
endDate.description: The date the position finished, if applicable.

role.title: Role
role.description: The position held by the candidate.

description.title: Description
description.description: A written description of the work involved.

workingWithChildren.title: Working With Children
workingWithChildren.description: Did this position involve working in a school or with children?

commitment.title: Commitment
commitment.description: Whether the work was full time or part time

workHistoryBreakExplanation.title: Work History Break Explanation
workHistoryBreakExplanation.description: The candidate’s explanation for any breaks in work history. Will be null if there aren't any breaks in the candidate’s work history. We define a break in work history as more than a month between 2 jobs.

references.title: References
references.description: Information about an applicant’s referee and the reference associated with the referee.

relationship.title: Relationship
relationship.description: The candidate’s description of their relationship with the referee.

reference.title: Reference
reference.description: The reference content provided by the referee.

safeguardingConcerns.title: Safeguarding Concerns
safeguardingConcerns.description: Indicates whether the referee flagged safeguarding concerns about this candidate.

refereeType.title: Referee Type
refereeType.description: The referee’s relationship to the candidate.

providerCode.title: Provider Code
providerCode.description: The training or the ratifying provider for the application and the course applied to

interviewDate.title: Interview Date And Time
interviewDate.description: Date and time of the interview

location.title: Location
location.description: The string describing where or how the interview will take place

cancelledOn.title: Cancelled On
cancelledOn.description: Date and time of cancellation, if cancelled

cancellationReason.title: Cancellation Reason
cancellationReason.description: The reason for the cancellation. If none are yet provided for an application rejected by default

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: Date and time the original interview was created

updatedOn.title: Updated On
updatedOn.description: Date and time the interview was updated

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description: Conditions to be met for admissions.

course.title: Course
course.description: Identifies the subject requested by an applicant and all related information.

offerMadeOn.title: Offer Made On
offerMadeOn.description: Date and time the offer was made.

offerAcceptedOn.title: Offer Accepted On
offerAcceptedOn.description: Date and time the offer was accepted.

offerDeclinedOn.title: Offer Declined On
offerDeclinedOn.description: Date and time the offer was declined.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: The reason for rejection or offer withdrawal.

hesaIttData.title: Hesa Itt Data
hesaIttData.description: Information required by HESA for the Initial Teacher Training data return. This information will only be returned once the application status is `enrolled`.

sex.title: Sex
sex.description: The candidate’s sex as a [1-digit HESA code for Sex].

disability.title: Disability
disability.description: The candidate’s disability as [a 2-digit HESA code for Disability].

ethnicity.title: Ethnicity
ethnicity.description: The candidate’s ethnicity as [a 2-digit HESA code for Ethnicity].

otherDisabilityDetails.title: Other Disability Details
otherDisabilityDetails.description: The candidate’s description of their disability, if they selected “Other” and entered a value.

otherEthnicityDetails.title: Other Ethnicity Details
otherEthnicityDetails.description: The candidate’s description of their ethnicity, if they selected “Other” and entered a value.

supportReference.title: Support Reference
supportReference.description: The candidate's reference number for their application in the Apply system.

safeguardingIssuesStatus.title: Safeguarding Issues Status
safeguardingIssuesStatus.description: Status of candidate's response to the safeguarding issues declaration.

safeguardingIssuesDetailsUrl.title: Safeguarding Issues Details Url
safeguardingIssuesDetailsUrl.description: URL to Apply system where safeguarding issues disclosed by the candidate can be access by users with permissions to view safeguarding information.

withdrawnOrDeclinedForCandidate.title: Withdrawn Or Declined For Candidate
withdrawnOrDeclinedForCandidate.description: Was application withdrawn or offer declined at candidate’s request
